title: Regime Pilot Strategy Spec
description: A deterministic, machine-readable trading-strategy specification. The LLM Skill authors this file; the engine executes it. Predicates are a CLOSED abstract syntax tree (no free-form code) so every spec is safe, auditable, and deterministic.

configurations_tried.description: Total number of distinct parameter configurations evaluated across the whole research process. REQUIRED for the deflated Sharpe ratio. Honesty rule: count every grid point you tried, not just the winner.

universe.description: Which assets the strategy may trade, as filters over the eligible token list (spec/universe.json).

source.description: eligible_list = the hackathon BEP-20 universe; explicit = use the 'symbols' list verbatim.

symbols.description: Used when source=explicit, or as an allow-filter on eligible_list.

max_market_cap_rank.description: Documented admission criterion for the prebuilt eligible list; not a dynamic backtest filter without point-in-time membership data.

min_volume_24h_usd.description: Documented admission criterion for the prebuilt eligible list; runtime selection ranks by observed 24h dollar volume.

features.description: Named, typed derived series. Each references a raw data field and a transformation. The engine computes these per-hour using ONLY data strictly before the current hour (no lookahead).

name.description: Unique snake_case id; referenced by predicates.

source.description: Raw data field implemented by the installed deterministic engine. Unsupported sources must be added to both the engine and schema before a skill may emit them.

asset.description: Optional symbol this feature is computed for (e.g. BTC). Omit for market-wide sources or per-universe breadth.

window.description: Lookback length in hours. Required for sma/realized_vol/percentile_rank/breadth/delta.

threshold_kind.description: For breadth: the per-asset condition counted across the universe.

threshold_window.description: For breadth: window of the per-asset mean (e.g. 30d).

rank_window.description: Optional. If set, the transform's output is percentile-ranked (0..100) over this trailing window. Lets any transform be expressed as a percentile, e.g. percentile rank of realized vol. This is how the flagship uses percentile-based thresholds.

regimes.description: Mutually-evaluated regime definitions. The engine assigns the FIRST regime whose predicate holds for >= persistence_hours consecutive hours (hysteresis). The last regime SHOULD be a catch-all 'chop' with predicate {const_bool:true}.

persistence_hours.description: Consecutive hours the predicate must hold before the regime activates (hysteresis).

playbooks.description: One playbook per regime name. Keys MUST match regime names; the engine validates this cross-reference.

action.description: flat = no positions (modeled as stables). hold_assets = hold the selected assets long. short_assets = hold the selected assets SHORT (negative weights; profits when price falls). staged_reentry = scale in as a feature recovers. mean_revert = single-pair MR.

select.description: How assets are chosen from the universe for hold_assets.

assets.description: Explicit asset list for staged_reentry / mean_revert.

min_hold_hours.description: Legacy documentation field retained for frozen specs. Executable switching hysteresis is regimes[].persistence_hours.

reentry_feature.description: For staged_reentry: feature whose percentile recovery scales exposure in.

sizing.description: Drawdown-budget sizing law: position_size = min(vol_target_size, k * remaining_drawdown_budget / asset_vol).

k.description: Aggressiveness multiplier on the drawdown-budget term. Conservative default <= 1.

vol_target_annual.description: Target annualized portfolio volatility, e.g. 0.20 for 20%.

asset_vol_feature.description: Name of a realized_vol feature used as asset_vol in the denominator.

max_drawdown_budget.description: Total drawdown the strategy is allowed to spend, e.g. 0.20 = 20%.

max_gross_exposure.description: Max sum of absolute weights, e.g. 1.0 = fully invested, no leverage.

derisk_ladder.description: Rungs that cut exposure as the drawdown budget is consumed. Evaluated in order; the engine applies the highest-consumption rung whose trigger is met.

budget_consumed.description: Fraction of the drawdown budget used up (e.g. 0.5, 0.75, 0.9).

gross_exposure_multiplier.description: Multiply gross exposure by this (e.g. 0.5 = halve, 0.0 = flat).

except_regimes.description: Regimes exempt from this rung, e.g. capitulation re-entry.

slippage_bps_floor.description: Fixed slippage floor per fill, in bps.

slippage_size_coeff.description: Size-aware slippage: extra bps = coeff * (order_notional / asset_volume_24h). Conservative; not an order-book model.

latency_minutes.description: The installed hourly engine supports exactly 60 minutes from decision to outcome/fill interval.

short_borrow_bps_per_day.description: Borrow/funding cost in bps per day applied to short notional (short_assets). Absent/0 = no short cost (long-only specs).

predicate.description: Closed boolean AST. Either a boolean literal, a logical node (and/or/not), or a comparison node.
